meanings.definition: a sum of money paid in compensation for loss or injury
the occurrence of a change for the worse
the act of damaging something or someone
the amount of money needed to purchase something
examples: he got his new car on excellent terms

meanings.definition: any harm or injury resulting from a violation of a legal right

examples: She damaged the car when she hit the tree

meanings.definition: suffer or be susceptible to damage
examples: These fine china cups damage easily
